goal: Add a --dry-run flag to scripts/persistent-solve.py: when set, only run recursive planning and print the kanban tree, then exit without executing tasks. Add the argparse arg, pass it through persistent_solve to _run_dag_mode, and return early after planning.

tree.description: Add dry-run early return in _run_dag_mode after planning phase: print the kanban tree and return before executing tasks
Add a test verifying --dry-run plans but does not execute tasks

children.description: Create tests/test_dry_run.py with importlib workaround, test fixtures, and a test verifying execute_dag is never called when dry_run=True in dag mode
Create tests/test_dry_run.py with importlib workaround and module-level import of persistent-solve symbols
Add pytest fixture that builds a synthetic RecursiveDAG containing at least one RecursiveTask
Write test_dag_mode_dry_run_skips_execute that mocks plan_dag, execute_dag, and clarify_goal, calls _run_dag_mode with dry_run=True, and asserts execute_dag was never called
Write test_dag_mode_dry_run_skips_execute that mocks plan_dag, execute_dag, and clarify_goal, calls _run_dag_mode with dry_run=True, and asserts execute_dag was never called
Add a test verifying execute_recursive_dag is never called when dry_run=True in recursive mode
Add a test verifying that plan output (kanban tree or plan summary) is printed to stdout when --dry-run is used
Run pytest on tests/test_dry_run.py to confirm tests are valid (expected RED failures since execution-skip logic is not yet implemented)
